## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (engine)

## How I tested
<!-- Commands + results. -->
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run validate` is clean
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change (TDD)

## Checklist
- [ ] Respects the invariants in `CLAUDE.md` (no hand-edited `index/`, stable IDs, write-pipeline only)
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (or justified above)
- [ ] Deterministic generator output (stable, sorted)
- [ ] Updated relevant docs (`README.md` / `GETTING_STARTED.md` / spec)
